RichText.Text: 1. present a critical portrait of... 2. be portrayed/described as... 3. beyond description 4. promise to wait for him after the war 5. instead of waiting for him 6. an unhappy marriage of convenience 7. a self-made millionaire 8. throw unbelievably numerous parties 9. despite the fact that she genuinely loves him 10. in the hope of doing sth. 11. pursue nothing in daily lives 12. the pursuit of wealth and influence 13. lay emphasis on =emphasize 14. cause misfortune 15. it is fortunate for sb to do... unfortunately /unluckily fortune

TextRun.Text: 6. 一桩不幸的权宜婚姻（利益婚姻）
不幸的是 / 倒霉的是(adv.)

RichText.Text: 1. 呈现一个批判性的写照/画像…… 2. 被描绘/描述为…… 3. 难以形容，无法描述 4. 承诺战后等他 5. 而不是等他 6. 一桩不幸的权宜婚姻（利益婚姻） 7. 白手起家的百万富翁 8. 举办多得令人难以置信的派对 9. 尽管她真心地/真诚地/真正地爱他 10. 抱着做某事的希望 11. 日常生活中无所追求（v.） 12. 对财富和影响力的追求(n.) 13. 强调（同 emphasize） 14. 导致不幸(n.) 15. 某人做某事是幸运的(adj.) 不幸的是 / 倒霉的是(adv.) 幸运，运气；财富(n.)
